info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Domestic Transfer Management API
info.description: The Domestic Transfer Management API facilitates the seamless processing of domestic money transfers between accounts. It allows financial institutions and service providers to initiate and manage transfer requests, ensuring efficiency and security in transactions. Typical consumers of this API include banks, fintech applications, and payment processing services that require reliable domestic funds movement. This API supports various transaction types and can be integrated into broader financial ecosystems to enhance user experience and service offerings.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to initiate a transfer of funds within the same country, facilitating quick and secure transactions between domestic accounts.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to initiate a domestic transfer operation. It contains the details required to carry out the transaction, such as sender information, recipient information, and the transfer amount.

200.description: Request completed successfully, and the response includes the created resource.

400.description: The request contains invalid parameters or data.

500.description: An unexpected server error occurred while processing the request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Domestic Transfer Response

sourceAccount.description: Details of the source account involved in the transfer.

beneficiary.description: Information about the beneficiary receiving the funds.

charges.description: Details of fees and charges associated with the transaction.

system.description: System metadata related to the transaction processing.

message.description: Additional message or notes regarding the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Response schema for a domestic transfer operation.

amount.description: The amount of money to be transferred.

currency.description: The currency in which the transaction is made.

transferMode.description: The mode of transfer (e.g., immediate, scheduled).

processedAt.description: The date and time when the transaction was processed.

valueDate.description: The date on which the value of the transaction is recognized.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Account Details

availableBalance.description: The current available balance in the account.

currency.description: The currency of the account balance.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Details of an account involved in the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Beneficiary Details

accountNumber.description: The account number of the beneficiary.

bankCode.description: The bank code of the beneficiary's bank.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Information about the beneficiary receiving the transfer.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Charges Details

fee.description: The fee charged for processing the transaction.

tax.description: Any applicable tax on the transaction fee.

currency.description: The currency for the fee and tax amounts.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Details of any charges associated with the transaction.

traceId.description: Unique identifier for tracing the transaction in the system.

processingTimeMs.description: The time taken to process the transaction in milliseconds.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Domestic Transfer Error Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the error occurrence.

status.description: The HTTP status code representing the error.

error.description: A short description of the error.

errorCode.description: A specific error code associated with the error.

message.description: A detailed message describing the error.
message.example: The fund transfer request contains invalid or missing information.

path.description: The path of the request that resulted in the error.

traceId.description: A unique identifier for tracing the request.

validationErrors.description: An array of validation errors encountered during the processing of the request.

example.message: Transfer amount must be greater than zero.

request.description: The request object that caused the error.

suggestion.description: Possible suggestions to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Verify the beneficiary details, transfer amount, and currency before retrying the request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema representing the response returned for a domestic transfer operation that resulted in a 400 error.

example.message: The fund transfer request contains invalid or missing information.

validationErrors.message: Transfer amount must be greater than zero.

example.suggestion: Verify the beneficiary details, transfer amount, and currency before retrying the request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Validation Error

field.description: The name of the field that caused the validation error.

rejectedValue.description: The value that was rejected during validation.

message.description: A message explaining why the validation failed.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema representing a validation error in the request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Transfer Request

transferReference.description: A unique reference for the transfer.

sourceAccount.description: The account from which the funds are to be transferred.

beneficiaryId.description: The ID of the beneficiary receiving the funds.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema representing the transfer request data.

transferReference.description: Unique reference for the transfer operation.

sourceAccount.description: Details of the source account from which the transfer is initiated.

beneficiary.description: Details of the beneficiary who will receive the transfer.

transfer.description: Details of the transfer including amount, currency, purpose, and schedule.

notification.description: Preferences for notifications regarding the transfer.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema for domestic transfer operations in the POST request body.

accountNumber.description: Account number of the source account.

accountType.description: Type of the source account, e.g., savings, current.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema representing the source account information.

bankCode.description: Bank code of the beneficiary's bank.

ifscCode.description: IFSC code of the beneficiary's bank branch.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema for beneficiary details in a transfer.

currency.description: Currency in which the amount is represented.

remarks.description: Any additional remarks to be included with the transfer.

transferMode.description: Mode of transfer, e.g., immediate, scheduled.

schedule.description: Schedule information for the transfer if it is not immediate.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema for transfer details including amount, currency, and schedule information.

email.description: Indicates if the user wishes to receive email notifications.

sms.description: Indicates if the user wishes to receive SMS notifications.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: Schema for notification preferences regarding the transfer.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Domestic Transfer Operations Error Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: The HTTP status code indicating the error.

error.description: A short description of the error.

errorCode.description: A code that identifies the specific error type.

message.description: A human-readable message providing more details about the error.
message.example: An unexpected error occurred while processing the domestic fund transfer.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

traceId.description: A unique identifier for tracing the request through the system.

request.description: Details about the request that resulted in the error.

system.description: Details about the system state at the time of the error.

suggestion.description: Suggestions for resolving the error or alternative actions.
suggestion.example: Please retry the transaction after a few minutes. If the issue persists, contact customer support with the trace ID and incident ID.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: This schema represents the error response for domestic transfer operations when a server error occurs (HTTP 500).

example.message: An unexpected error occurred while processing the domestic fund transfer.

system.failureReason: Core banking system is temporarily unavailable.

example.suggestion: Please retry the transaction after a few minutes. If the issue persists, contact customer support with the trace ID and incident ID.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: Domestic Transfer Request Details

transferReference.description: The unique identifier for the transfer.

sourceAccount.description: The account from which the funds are being transferred.

beneficiaryId.description: The identifier of the beneficiary receiving the funds.

transferMode.description: The mode of transfer, such as immediate or scheduled.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: This schema contains the details of a domestic transfer request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.title: System Error Details

service.description: The name of the service that encountered the error.

operation.description: The specific operation being performed when the error occurred.

incidentId.description: The identifier for the incident related to the error.

retryable.description: Indicates whether the operation can be retried.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createDomesticTransfer-.description: This schema provides details about the system state at the time of an error.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
